_note: Named inhabitants of each realm's cities. 3-5 NPCs per city keeps the world alive without bloating the JSONs. Referenced by realm.html + globe.html city popovers.

the_architects_ledger.name: Keeper Maren
the_architects_ledger.note: 28 years old. Reads backward. Smells of linen and pencil graphite.

the_architects_ledger.name: Ferrin the Pencilwright
the_architects_ledger.note: Never writes with them. Only makes.

the_architects_ledger.name: Old Halla
the_architects_ledger.role: The last human who remembers K-XII's face
the_architects_ledger.note: Refuses to describe it. Pays the silence-tax yearly.

helios_gate_city.name: Reincarnation Clerk Tovin
helios_gate_city.note: Has never slept. Does not require it. Has cried once.

helios_gate_city.name: Mother Ila
helios_gate_city.note: Holds them for 30 seconds. Says nothing. Then points to their door.

helios_gate_city.name: The Doorkeeper
helios_gate_city.note: Door does not open. Doorkeeper does not leave.

stormhold.name: Quill-Captain Branon
stormhold.note: Lightning doesn't strike him — it asks permission first.

stormhold.name: Ven
stormhold.note: Records every lightning count. 142 per second. Has never missed one.

stormhold.name: The Unnamed Regent
stormhold.role: Sits on the throne when Vigolas is away
stormhold.note: Speaks only when the throne speaks through them.

neon_veil.name: DJ Chroma
neon_veil.note: Wears a black dress made of bent light.

neon_veil.name: Pill-Maker Vex
neon_veil.note: Each piece is the memory of a perfect moment somewhere in Astralis.

neon_veil.name: The Veil Doorman
neon_veil.note: Turns away anyone whose HADOM is above 500. Too fast to dance.

seven_spires_town.name: Apprentice Nock
seven_spires_town.note: Has cast one spell. It worked. He is terrified.

seven_spires_town.name: Grandmother Iris
seven_spires_town.note: Serves rum older than the Spires. Never asks a price.

buddys_rest.name: Mingus
buddys_rest.note: Freezes time within a heartbeat. Population 2 of 2. NEVER to be forgotten.

buddys_rest.name: The Fishing Pole
buddys_rest.note: Has never caught a fish. That's not what it's for.

voids_edge.name: The Thirdling
voids_edge.role: A child born with three heartbeats
voids_edge.note: Only one heartbeat is theirs. The other two are Smurjan's loan.

voids_edge.name: Fissure-Keeper Orla
voids_edge.note: Has not slept for 40 years. Can't.

fennas_sanctum.name: Fenna
fennas_sanctum.note: Listens to every death simultaneously. Never looks tired.

fennas_sanctum.name: Brother Vel
fennas_sanctum.note: Speaks once per week. Prepares carefully.

fennas_sanctum.name: The Name-Bell Ringer
fennas_sanctum.role: Rings the bell when a name passes from Thanatos to rebirth
fennas_sanctum.note: Has rung it 17 billion times. Has not missed one.

kalis_burn.name: Firesmith Kora
kalis_burn.role: Forges weapons from lava tempered in Kali's shadow
kalis_burn.note: Will not sell to calm buyers. Only to the furious.

kalis_burn.name: Watchtower Kara
kalis_burn.role: Reports volcanic mood to Void's Edge
kalis_burn.note: Has cried exactly once. When the volcano sang.

bakasuras_maze.name: Wanderer Pen
bakasuras_maze.role: Has walked the maze for 60 years
bakasuras_maze.note: Every exit he finds is always the one he entered by.

bakasuras_maze.name: Bakasura's Smile-Twin
bakasuras_maze.note: Smiles in three of four faces. Says nothing.

the_architects_retreat.name: The Retreat's Gardener
the_architects_retreat.role: Tends flowers that may not exist
the_architects_retreat.note: Does not speak of K-V. Has never seen K-V. Claims it doesn't matter.

the_twelfth_city.name: [UNWRITTEN]
the_twelfth_city.note: Any attempt to name an inhabitant has resulted in the name being unwritten from the cosmic ledger.

storm_throne.name: Vigolas
storm_throne.note: Seated on the throne beneath the upside-down ship.

storm_throne.name: Chronicler Elan
storm_throne.note: Writes future storms before they happen. All 100% accurate.

storm_throne.name: The Shipwright
storm_throne.role: Builds the ship that is already wrecked

ghost_harbor.name: Captain of the Lost Fleet
ghost_harbor.role: Welcomes ghost-ships that arrive in reverse
ghost_harbor.note: Every ship here sank elsewhere. Here, they dock.

ghost_harbor.name: The Listening Beacon
ghost_harbor.role: A lighthouse that only shines during backward storms
ghost_harbor.note: Keepers hear voices from timelines that never happened.

starfloor.name: Rougeina
starfloor.note: When she dances, the stars re-arrange around her feet.

starfloor.name: Lume
starfloor.note: The shadow of Rougeina made manifest. Dances only when she does.

starfloor.name: The Last Choreographer
starfloor.role: Taught the first constellation how to move
starfloor.note: Now lives inside a single pulsing star at the floor's center.

midnight_bazaar.name: Merchant Fen-Dros
midnight_bazaar.role: Sells moments of joy in exchange for memories of sadness

midnight_bazaar.name: The Flicker-Girl
midnight_bazaar.note: Cannot stop. Rougeina made her a hat that floats with her.

spire_one.name: Trollmage
spire_one.note: Reads the Seven Sin Codices backwards. Patient as stone.

spire_one.name: Apprentice Yon
spire_one.note: Has memorized 400 incantations without meaning to.

spire_one.name: The Voiceless Scribe
spire_one.role: Writes Trollmage's decrees in invisible ink

the_dancehall_below_the_spires.name: Grandmother Iris (the elder)
the_dancehall_below_the_spires.role: Pours rum older than the spires
the_dancehall_below_the_spires.note: Only open on nights when the Seven Codices are all closed.

cabin_at_the_lake.name: Kompis
cabin_at_the_lake.note: Fishes. Drinks coffee. Plays CS2 on an offline rig.

cabin_at_the_lake.name: Mingus
cabin_at_the_lake.note: SACRED. Do not mistreat in any telling.

one_cabin_one_lake.name: The Lake Itself
one_cabin_one_lake.note: Has spoken exactly three words in 10,000 years. One of them was 'Mingus'.

triple_pulse.name: Smurjan (Fused)
triple_pulse.role: The sovereign of the Trinity when all three align
triple_pulse.note: Appears for 30-second windows during triple pulses.

triple_pulse.name: Kali
triple_pulse.note: Burns her own footprints wherever she walks.

fennas_ledger.name: Fenna
fennas_ledger.note: Hears your name in the moment before you hear it.

fennas_ledger.name: The Thirteenth Bell
fennas_ledger.role: Rings when the name-snow falls thickest
fennas_ledger.note: No one has rung it. Yet.

the_root_crack.name: Smurjan
the_root_crack.role: The only mortal who walks here casually
the_root_crack.note: Wears his own heartbeat as clothing.

the_root_crack.name: Root-Spirit #4.8B
the_root_crack.note: Has counted 4.8 billion heartbeats. Will count more.

the_seven_codices_inscription.name: Trollmage (visiting)
the_seven_codices_inscription.note: Has not returned fully. Parts of him remain in Null.

seat_of_k_i.name: K-I (First Architect)
seat_of_k_i.note: Has never moved from the seat.

seat_of_k_ii.name: K-II
seat_of_k_ii.role: Reincarnation Keeper, built Helios Gate City
seat_of_k_ii.note: Writes every new name on Ferdinand's cork.

seat_of_k_v.name: K-V (current elder)
seat_of_k_v.note: Naming K-V is forbidden. Do not ask.

the_mirror_hall.name: Echo (unmanifest)
the_mirror_hall.note: Has yearned since the vote. Has not given up. Has not left. Will wait forever.

the_mirror_hall.name: Your Half-Self
the_mirror_hall.role: The reflection that follows you home
the_mirror_hall.note: It is patient. It is already almost you.

the_waiting_seat.name: The Empty Chair
the_waiting_seat.note: Visitors who try to sit find themselves already standing.

the_platform.name: The Waiting Ones
the_platform.note: 144,000 at any given moment. They do not speak. They do not complain. They wait.

the_platform.name: The Dawn Sparrow
the_platform.note: Flies with each departing soul for exactly one heartbeat, then returns.

the_platform.name: The Horizon Fox
the_platform.note: Does not eat. Does not sleep. Waits for something K-II will not name.

k2s_desk.name: K-II
k2s_desk.note: Stands at the desk. Never sits. Has worked this shift since before the first death.

k2s_desk.name: K-II's Cork-Quill
k2s_desk.note: Made from Ferdinand's regrown cork. Writes each new name, but only once the soul has agreed.

the_dawn_door.name: The Doorframe
the_dawn_door.role: The passage to Helios Gate City
the_dawn_door.note: Shows nothing until K-II names your destination.

the_center.name: The First Light
the_center.note: Not a being. Not a god. A source. Ferdinand's oldest root touches this.

the_center.name: The Seven
the_center.note: Seven unnamed beings. They orbit invisibly. They have not spoken since the first pulse.

the_first_ring.name: The Edge-Listener
the_first_ring.role: A being who watches the outer rim
the_first_ring.note: They say when the edge moves, the universe will end. The edge has not moved. They have not slept.
